title: TV dialogue snippet
text: Hey, did you see that? No way! That was epic. Wait, what's happening now? Just watch. Trust me on this one, okay?
tips: TV banter is short, snappy, real

character_tips.maxim: TV writing is the high-density end of dialogue. Master this.
character_tips.knopych: 📺 SCRIPT MODE! Two characters arguing at speed!
character_tips.klavochka: Friends talking on a show, my dear 💬
